sme_comments: The Client Contact Note (CCN) is missing key details to fully assess completeness and quality. Additional information is required to determine if there are any reverse solicitation or cross-border risks.

possible_solicitation.reason: The note indicates the interaction was initiated by the Account Holder, which suggests it was a reverse solicitation. However, more details are needed to confirm this.
possible_solicitation.rm_next_action: Obtain and document the client's explicit request for the advisory session, including the specific topics discussed and any investment recommendations provided. Ensure the rationale for the recommendations is clearly explained.

missing_info: Who - the specific participants and their roles (e.g., Account Holder, RM, etc.)
What - the specific investment topics discussed and any recommendations made
Why - the client's rationale for the decisions made during the advisory session
When - the date and time of the interaction
follow_up_questions: What were the specific investment topics discussed and any recommendations made during the advisory session?
What was the client's rationale for the decisions made during the advisory session?
When did the advisory session take place?
suggested_ccn: On [DATE] at [TIME], I, [RM NAME] (RM), had a phone call with [CLIENT NAME] (Account Holder). The purpose of the call was to conduct an [ADVISORY SESSION]. During the session, we discussed [INVESTMENT TOPICS] and I provided [RECOMMENDATIONS]. The client's rationale for the decisions made was [RATIONALE]. [ADD ADDITIONAL DETAILS ON HOW THE DECISION WAS REACHED, RISKS DISCLOSED, AND CLIENT'S UNDERSTANDING].
